'''ân-p-n''' ('''kanapan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yap|yap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yap|yap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| kanapan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinapan|thinapan]] || [[word:jinapan|jinapan]] || [[word:shinapan|shinapan]] || [[word:kinapan|kinapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunapan|thuthunapan]] || [[word:jujunapan|jujunapan]] || [[word:shushunapan|shushunapan]] || [[word:kukunapan|kukunapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunapan|thunapan]] || [[word:junapan|junapan]] || [[word:shunapan|shunapan]] || [[word:kunapan|kunapan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunapan|thunapan]] || [[word:junapan|junapan]] || [[word:shunapan|shunapan]] || [[word:kunapan|kunapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenapan|thenapan]] || [[word:jenapan|jenapan]] || [[word:shenapan|shenapan]] || [[word:kenapan|kenapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonapan|thothonapan]] || [[word:jojonapan|jojonapan]] || [[word:shoshonapan|shoshonapan]] || [[word:kokonapan|kokonapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonapan|thonapan]] || [[word:jonapan|jonapan]] || [[word:shonapan|shonapan]] || [[word:konapan|konapan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonapan|thonapan]] || [[word:jonapan|jonapan]] || [[word:shonapan|shonapan]] || [[word:konapan|konapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnapan|thĂŠnapan]] || [[word:jĂŠnapan|jĂŠnapan]] || [[word:shĂŠnapan|shĂŠnapan]] || [[word:kĂŠnapan|kĂŠnapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanapan|thathanapan]] || [[word:jajanapan|jajanapan]] || [[word:shashanapan|shashanapan]] || [[word:kakanapan|kakanapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanapan|thanapan]] || [[word:janapan|janapan]] || [[word:shanapan|shanapan]] || [[word:kanapan|kanapan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanapan|thanapan]] || [[word:janapan|janapan]] || [[word:shanapan|shanapan]] || [[word:kanapan|kanapan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanapan|shanapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanapan|goshanapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanapan|gokishanapan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanapanĂŒ|shanapanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanapanknĂŒ|goshanapanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanapanĂŒ|gokishanapanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanapanshĂ«|shanapanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanapankshĂ«|goshanapankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanapanshĂ«|gokishanapanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanapanro|shanapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanapankro|goshanapankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanapanro|gokishanapanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanapanmu|shanapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanapankmu|goshanapankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanapanmu|gokishanapanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanapansher|shanapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanapanksher|goshanapanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanapansher|gokishanapansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanapang|shanapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanapankng|goshanapankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanapang|gokishanapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanapanya|shanapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanapankya|goshanapankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanapanya|gokishanapanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanapanyam|shanapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanapankyam|goshanapankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanapanyam|gokishanapanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanapanĂŒshĂ«|shanapanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanapanknĂŒshĂ«|goshanapanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanapanĂŒshĂ«|gokishanapanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanapanĂŒro|shanapanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanapanknĂŒro|goshanapanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanapanĂŒro|gokishanapanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanapanĂŒmu|shanapanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanapanknĂŒmu|goshanapanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanapanĂŒmu|gokishanapanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanapanshĂ«nĂŒ|shanapanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanapankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanapankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanapanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanapanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanapanshĂ«ro|shanapanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanapankshĂ«ro|goshanapankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanapanshĂ«ro|gokishanapanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanapanshĂ«mu|shanapanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanapankshĂ«mu|goshanapankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanapanshĂ«mu|gokishanapanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanapanronĂŒ|shanapanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanapankronĂŒ|goshanapankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanapanronĂŒ|gokishanapanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanapanroshĂ«|shanapanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanapankroshĂ«|goshanapankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanapanroshĂ«|gokishanapanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanapanromu|shanapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanapankromu|goshanapankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanapanromu|gokishanapanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanapanmunĂŒ|shanapanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanapankmunĂŒ|goshanapankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanapanmunĂŒ|gokishanapanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanapanmushĂ«|shanapanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanapankmushĂ«|goshanapankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanapanmushĂ«|gokishanapanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanapanmuro|shanapanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanapankmuro|goshanapankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanapanmuro|gokishanapanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|97f1258}}
